#====================================================================================================
# START - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================

# THIS SECTION CONTAINS CRITICAL TESTING INSTRUCTIONS FOR BOTH AGENTS
# BOTH MAIN_AGENT AND TESTING_AGENT MUST PRESERVE THIS ENTIRE BLOCK

# Communication Protocol:
# If the `testing_agent` is available, main agent should delegate all testing tasks to it.
#
# You have access to a file called `test_result.md`. This file contains the complete testing state
# and history, and is the primary means of communication between main and the testing agent.
#
# Main and testing agents must follow this exact format to maintain testing data. 
# The testing data must be entered in yaml format Below is the data structure:
# 
## user_problem_statement: {problem_statement}
## backend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.py"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## frontend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.js"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## metadata:
##   created_by: "main_agent"
##   version: "1.0"
##   test_sequence: 0
##   run_ui: false
##
## test_plan:
##   current_focus:
##     - "Task name 1"
##     - "Task name 2"
##   stuck_tasks:
##     - "Task name with persistent issues"
##   test_all: false
##   test_priority: "high_first"  # or "sequential" or "stuck_first"
##
## agent_communication:
##     -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##     -message: "Communication message between agents"

# Protocol Guidelines for Main agent
#
# 1. Update Test Result File Before Testing:
#    - Main agent must always update the `test_result.md` file before calling the testing agent
#    - Add implementation details to the status_history
#    - Set `needs_retesting` to true for tasks that need testing
#    - Update the `test_plan` section to guide testing priorities
#    - Add a message to `agent_communication` explaining what you've done
#
# 2. Incorporate User Feedback:
#    - When a user provides feedback that something is or isn't working, add this information to the relevant task's status_history
#    - Update the working status based on user feedback
#    - If a user reports an issue with a task that was marked as working, increment the stuck_count
#    - Whenever user reports issue in the app, if we have testing agent and task_result.md file so find the appropriate task for that and append in status_history of that task to contain the user concern and problem as well 
#
# 3. Track Stuck Tasks:
#    - Monitor which tasks have high stuck_count values or where you are fixing same issue again and again, analyze that when you read task_result.md
#    - For persistent issues, use websearch tool to find solutions
#    - Pay special attention to tasks in the stuck_tasks list
#    - When you fix an issue with a stuck task, don't reset the stuck_count until the testing agent confirms it's working
#
# 4. Provide Context to Testing Agent:
#    - When calling the testing agent, provide clear instructions about:
#      - Which tasks need testing (reference the test_plan)
#      - Any authentication details or configuration needed
#      - Specific test scenarios to focus on
#      - Any known issues or edge cases to verify
#
# 5. Call the testing agent with specific instructions referring to test_result.md
#
# IMPORTANT: Main agent must ALWAYS update test_result.md BEFORE calling the testing agent, as it relies on this file to understand what to test next.

#====================================================================================================
# END - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================



#====================================================================================================
# Testing Data - Main Agent and testing sub agent both should log testing data below this section
#====================================================================================================

user_problem_statement: "Test the Off Campus dating app backend API with comprehensive endpoint testing including health checks, colleges, auth, profile management, verification, discovery/matching, location tracking, confessions, ratings, and admin endpoints."

backend:
  - task: "Health Check Endpoints"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "GET /api/ returns 'Off Campus API' message correctly. GET /api/health returns healthy status. Both endpoints working as expected."

  - task: "Colleges Endpoints"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "GET /api/colleges/list returns all 19 Delhi colleges (DU, IPU, IIT Delhi, JNU, DTU, etc.). GET /api/colleges/{college_id} returns specific college details. Database properly seeded with college data including coordinates, email domains, and types."

  - task: "Auth Endpoints"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "POST /api/auth/google-session endpoint exists and properly validates session IDs. GET /api/auth/me correctly requires authentication and returns user data when authenticated. POST /api/auth/logout properly requires authentication and deletes sessions. All auth endpoints working correctly (Google OAuth integration not tested as per instructions)."

  - task: "Profile Management Endpoints"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "PATCH /api/profile/update successfully updates user profile fields (bio, age, interests, etc.). POST /api/profile/photos adds photos to user profile. DELETE /api/profile/photos/{index} removes photos correctly. POST /api/profile/spotify updates Spotify data and increases vibe score. All profile endpoints working correctly with proper authentication."

  - task: "Verification Endpoints"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "POST /api/verification/submit successfully creates verification requests with college_id and ID card image. Request ID returned correctly. User verification status updated to pending. Endpoint working as expected."

  - task: "Discovery/Matching Endpoints"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "GET /api/discovery/profiles returns verified users with photos, respects premium status for inter-campus access. POST /api/discovery/like creates likes and detects matches correctly. POST /api/discovery/pass works as expected. GET /api/discovery/matches returns matched users. All discovery endpoints working correctly."

  - task: "Location/Campus Tracking Endpoints"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "POST /api/location/update calculates distance from college using Haversine formula, correctly determines on-campus status (within 0.5km). GET /api/location/campus-users returns users currently on campus (updated in last 30 minutes). GPS-based tracking working correctly."

  - task: "Confessions Endpoints"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "POST /api/confessions/create creates anonymous confessions with college_id. GET /api/confessions/feed returns confessions filtered by college with proper anonymity (user_id hidden). POST /api/confessions/{confession_id}/like increments like count. POST /api/confessions/{confession_id}/comment adds comments. GET /api/confessions/{confession_id}/comments returns comments with anonymity. All confession endpoints working correctly."

  - task: "Ratings Endpoints"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "POST /api/ratings/create successfully creates ratings (1-5 scale), updates existing ratings, recalculates vibe score based on average ratings. Rating system working correctly with proper vibe score calculation."

  - task: "Admin Endpoints"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "GET /api/admin/verification-requests returns pending verification requests. POST /api/admin/verification/{request_id}/approve approves requests and updates user verification status to verified. POST /api/admin/verification/{request_id}/reject rejects requests and updates status. All admin endpoints working correctly."

  - task: "Database Seed Data"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "Database properly seeded with 19 Delhi colleges (including DU colleges, IPU, IIT Delhi, JNU, DTU, etc.) with correct coordinates, email domains, and types. 5 dummy verified users created with complete profiles including Spotify data, photos, and vibe scores. All indexes created correctly."

frontend:
  - task: "Frontend Testing"
    implemented: false
    working: "NA"
    file: "N/A"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "low"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: "NA"
          agent: "testing"
          comment: "Frontend testing not performed as per testing agent instructions (backend testing only)."

metadata:
  created_by: "testing_agent"
  version: "1.0"
  test_sequence: 1
  run_ui: false

test_plan:
  current_focus:
    - "All backend endpoints tested and verified"
  stuck_tasks: []
  test_all: true
  test_priority: "high_first"

agent_communication:
    - agent: "testing"
      message: "Comprehensive backend API testing completed. All 10 endpoint categories tested successfully (Health Check, Colleges, Auth, Profile, Verification, Discovery, Location, Confessions, Ratings, Admin). Database seed data verified (19 colleges, 5 dummy users). 30 out of 31 tests passed. One test failure was a minor test logic issue checking college names - the colleges exist with correct data but test was checking full names instead of short names. This does not affect API functionality. All critical backend features working correctly including: MongoDB integration, Vibe Score calculation, GPS-based campus tracking, Anonymous confessions, Matching system, Premium inter-campus access, and Spotify data integration."
